allow: PowerShell($py = \(Get-Command python -ErrorAction SilentlyContinue\); if \($py\) { python --version } else { "python NOT found" }; $ff = \(Get-Command ffmpeg -ErrorAction SilentlyContinue\); if \($ff\) { "ffmpeg: found" } else { "ffmpeg NOT found" })

PowerShell(cd "E:\\cursor\\Ios shortcut downlaod"; Start-Process -WindowStyle Hidden -FilePath ".\\.venv\\Scripts\\python.exe" -ArgumentList "server.py"; Start-Sleep -Seconds 4; try { \(Invoke-WebRequest -Uri "http://127.0.0.1:8000/" -UseBasicParsing\).Content } catch { "ERR: $_" })
PowerShell($ff = Get-Command ffmpeg -ErrorAction SilentlyContinue; if \($ff\) { "ffmpeg ready: " + $ff.Source } else { "still installing / need PATH refresh" })

PowerShell(cd "E:\\cursor\\Ios shortcut downlaod"; $u = "http://127.0.0.1:8000/dl?url=https://www.tiktok.com/@scout2015/video/6718335390845095173"; try { $r = Invoke-WebRequest -Uri $u -OutFile "test_out.bin" -PassThru -TimeoutSec 120; "Saved bytes: " + \(Get-Item test_out.bin\).Length + " | type: " + $r.Headers['Content-Type'] } catch { "ERR: $_" })

PowerShell(cd "E:\\cursor\\Ios shortcut downlaod"; Remove-Item test_out.bin -ErrorAction SilentlyContinue; Get-Process python -ErrorAction SilentlyContinue | Stop-Process -Force; Start-Sleep 2; $ff = Get-Command ffmpeg -ErrorAction SilentlyContinue; if \($ff\) { "ffmpeg: " + \(ffmpeg -version | Select-Object -First 1\) } else { "ffmpeg still not on PATH in this session" })

PowerShell($p = Get-ChildItem -Path "$env:LOCALAPPDATA\\Microsoft\\WinGet\\Packages" -Recurse -Filter ffmpeg.exe -ErrorAction SilentlyContinue | Select-Object -First 1; if \($p\) { $p.FullName } else { "not found under WinGet Packages"; Get-ChildItem "$env:LOCALAPPDATA\\Microsoft\\WinGet\\Links\\ffmpeg.exe" -ErrorAction SilentlyContinue | ForEach-Object FullName })

PowerShell(cd "E:\\cursor\\Ios shortcut downlaod"; Start-Process -WindowStyle Hidden -FilePath ".\\.venv\\Scripts\\python.exe" -ArgumentList "server.py"; Start-Sleep 4; \(Invoke-WebRequest -Uri "http://127.0.0.1:8000/" -UseBasicParsing\).Content)
